title: Munir Zuu and Anor v Attorney General and Ors (2025/CCZ/009) [2025] ZMCC 27 (5 December 2025)
case_name: Munir Zuu and Anor v Attorney General and Ors
issue_tags: Disqualification of counsel requires evidence of confidential information relevant to the new matter and a real risk of prejudice; mere employment or listing on letterhead insufficient.
outcome_detail: Court dismissed application to disqualify petitioners' counsel for alleged conflict absent evidence of confidential information or real prejudice
